sort.name: Name
Complete the legal footer fields from th: Complete the legal footer fields from the admin store settings to publish company information here.
Direct consumers to the official ANPC el: Direct consumers to the official ANPC electronic complaint portal.
Alternative dispute resolution for consu: Alternative dispute resolution for consumer disputes handled through ANPC.
We use essential cookies to keep checkou: We use essential cookies to keep checkout, security, and language preferences working. You can accept analytics and marketing cookies, reject non-essential cookies, or fine-tune your choices.
No non-essential cookies will be set unl: No non-essential cookies will be set unless you choose them.
Choose which optional cookies can help u: Choose which optional cookies can help us improve Printel. Essential cookies stay on because the store cannot function without them.
Needed for cart, checkout, security, and: Needed for cart, checkout, security, and your consent selection.
Remember your language, region, and othe: Remember your language, region, and other shopping choices.
Help us understand visits, navigation pa: Help us understand visits, navigation paths, and store performance so we can improve the shopping experience.
Measure campaign performance, limit ad f: Measure campaign performance, limit ad frequency, detect invalid traffic, and understand which ads lead to visits or sales.
Allow advertising partners such as Googl: Allow advertising partners such as Google to personalize ads and show more relevant promotions, only if you consent.
Reject is as easy as accept: Reject is as easy as accept
You can refuse optional cookies immediat: You can refuse optional cookies immediately without losing access to the shop.
Use the manage cookies button later to r: Use the manage cookies button later to review or update your preferences.
One or more products are no longer eligi: One or more products are no longer eligible for print-on-demand checkout.
Configure the Romanian legal entity, cho: Configure the Romanian legal entity, choose sandbox or live mode, and decide whether ANAF submission runs automatically or waits for manual approval.
Use sandbox first. The Connect button op: Use sandbox first. The Connect button opens the ANAF authorization flow, Connection check validates the stored token, and Disconnect removes the refresh token from the secure connection state table.
If authentication expires, queued orders: If authentication expires, queued orders will pause in blocked-authentication until an admin reconnects the profile.
No ANAF attempts have been recorded yet.
Your order details are confirmed below. We only release this confirmation once the related ANAF e-Factura registration has completed.
Connect the ANAF profile before automati: Connect the ANAF profile before automatic submissions can run.
The ANAF sandbox token is invalid or exp: The ANAF sandbox token is invalid or expired.
ANAF is not connected for the selected l: ANAF is not connected for the selected legal entity.
The ANAF authorization must be renewed b: The ANAF authorization must be renewed before retrying queued invoices.
ANAF accepted the retry request later th: ANAF accepted the retry request later than the storefront timeout window.
ANAF accepted the upload request but did: ANAF accepted the upload request but did not return an upload index.
ANAF is still processing the uploaded in: ANAF is still processing the uploaded invoice.
ANAF reported an error while processing: ANAF reported an error while processing the invoice.
Order data changed after the ANAF snapsh: Order data changed after the ANAF snapshot was created. Manual review is required.
Order #${orderNumber} was canceled befor: Order #${orderNumber} was canceled before ANAF registration completed.
ANAF SPV authentication requires the reg: ANAF SPV authentication requires the registered OAuth application plus the company certificate or token flow available to the authorized administrator using this screen.
Reconnect after certificate renewal, tok: Reconnect after certificate renewal, token replacement, or redirect URI changes, then run Connection check to confirm the store can refresh the ANAF session successfully.
Switching between sandbox and live is di: Switching between sandbox and live is disabled here and controlled by deployment config.
Use this screen to switch between sandbo: Use this screen to switch between sandbox/test and live ANAF for this store.
